topics.name: Artificial Intelligence
topics.description: The broad field of creating machines that simulate human intelligence and reasoning.

topics.name: Machine Learning
topics.description: Algorithms that learn from data to make predictions and decisions without being explicitly programmed.

topics.name: Deep Learning
topics.description: Neural network-based learning with multiple layers to model complex patterns in data.

topics.name: Natural Language Processing
topics.description: Techniques for processing and understanding human language using computational methods.

topics.name: Computer Vision
topics.description: Enabling machines to interpret and understand visual information from images and videos.

topics.name: Reinforcement Learning
topics.description: Training agents to make decisions by rewarding desired behaviors in an environment.

topics.name: MLOps
topics.description: Practices for deploying, monitoring, and maintaining ML models in production.

topics.name: Agentic AI
topics.description: Building autonomous AI systems that plan, reason, and take actions to achieve goals.

topics.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
topics.description: Augmenting LLM generation with retrieved external knowledge to improve accuracy and reduce hallucinations.

topics.name: Supervised Learning
topics.description: Training models on labeled examples to predict outputs for unseen inputs.

topics.name: Unsupervised Learning
topics.description: Discovering patterns in unlabeled data through clustering, dimensionality reduction, and generative models.

topics.name: Feature Engineering
topics.description: Transforming raw data into informative features that improve model performance.

topics.name: Model Evaluation
topics.description: Techniques for measuring model performance: metrics, cross-validation, and error analysis.

topics.name: Ensemble Methods
topics.description: Combining multiple models (bagging, boosting, stacking) to improve predictions.

topics.name: Neural Network Fundamentals
topics.description: Perceptrons, activation functions, backpropagation, and gradient descent.

topics.name: Convolutional Neural Networks
topics.description: Specialized neural architectures for processing grid-like data such as images.

topics.name: RNNs & LSTMs
topics.description: Recurrent architectures for sequential data including text, time series, and speech.

topics.name: Transformers
topics.description: Attention-based neural architectures that revolutionized NLP and many other domains.

topics.name: Generative Adversarial Networks
topics.description: Two-network adversarial framework for generating realistic synthetic data.

topics.name: Diffusion Models
topics.description: Iterative denoising generative models powering state-of-the-art image synthesis.

topics.name: Text Preprocessing
topics.description: Tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, and cleaning text for ML pipelines.

topics.name: Word Embeddings
topics.description: Dense vector representations of words: Word2Vec, GloVe, FastText.

topics.name: Large Language Models
topics.description: Foundation models trained on massive text corpora: GPT, Llama, Gemini, Claude.

topics.name: Prompt Engineering
topics.description: Crafting effective prompts to guide LLM behavior: few-shot, chain-of-thought, structured output.

topics.name: Fine-Tuning LLMs
topics.description: Adapting pre-trained LLMs to specific tasks using supervised fine-tuning and RLHF.

topics.name: Vector Embeddings
topics.description: Encoding text into dense vectors that capture semantic meaning for similarity search.

topics.name: Chunking Strategies
topics.description: Splitting documents into optimal pieces: fixed-size, semantic, hierarchical, and agentic chunking.

topics.name: Retrieval Methods
topics.description: Dense, sparse, and hybrid retrieval techniques including BM25, FAISS, and semantic search.

topics.name: Vector Databases
topics.description: Specialized storage for high-dimensional vectors: Qdrant, Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB.

topics.name: Re-ranking
topics.description: Post-retrieval scoring to improve precision: cross-encoders, LLM-based re-ranking, Cohere Rerank.

topics.name: RAG Evaluation
topics.description: Measuring RAG pipeline quality: faithfulness, answer relevance, context precision with RAGAS.

topics.name: Production RAG Systems
topics.description: Scaling RAG to production: caching, latency optimization, observability, and guardrails.

topics.name: Agentic RAG
topics.description: Autonomous RAG systems that plan retrieval strategies and self-correct for complex queries.

topics.name: AI Agents
topics.description: Autonomous systems that perceive, plan, and act to achieve goals using tools and reasoning.

topics.name: Tool Use
topics.description: Enabling LLMs to call external tools, APIs, and code interpreters.

topics.name: Agent Workflows
topics.description: Structured pipelines for agent execution: LangGraph, ReAct, plan-and-execute patterns.

topics.name: Multi-Agent Systems
topics.description: Coordinating multiple specialized agents to solve complex tasks collaboratively.

topics.name: Experiment Tracking
topics.description: Logging and comparing ML experiments with MLflow, Weights & Biases, and DVC.

topics.name: Model Serving
topics.description: Deploying models as APIs: FastAPI, BentoML, TorchServe, and serverless inference.

topics.name: Model Monitoring
topics.description: Detecting data drift, model degradation, and concept drift in production.

topics.name: CI/CD for ML
topics.description: Automating training, testing, and deployment pipelines for ML models.

topics.name: Image Classification
topics.description: Assigning class labels to images using CNNs and vision transformers.

topics.name: Object Detection
topics.description: Locating and classifying objects in images: YOLO, DETR, and Faster R-CNN.

topics.name: Vision Transformers
topics.description: Applying self-attention mechanisms to image patches: ViT, DINO, SAM.

topics.name: Policy Gradient Methods
topics.description: Directly optimizing policy parameters: REINFORCE, PPO, and actor-critic methods.

topics.name: Q-Learning & DQN
topics.description: Value-based RL: Bellman equations, Q-learning, and deep Q-networks.

topics.name: RLHF
topics.description: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback for aligning LLMs with human preferences.
